name: Double-Edged Sword
desc: Melee - Deal an additional 2% damage and receive an additional 1% damage Ranged - Deal an additional 1.5% damage and receive an additional 1.5% damage

name: Fury
desc: +1.25% Attack Speed

name: Sorcery
desc: +1.25% Cooldown Reduction

name: Butcher
desc: Basic attacks and single target spells deal an additional 2 damage to minions and monsters This does not trigger off of area of effect damage or damage over time effects

name: Expose Weakness
desc: Damaging an enemy with a spell increases allied champions' damage to that enemy by 1% for the next 3 seconds

name: Brute Force
desc: +4 Attack Damage at level 18 (+0.22 Attack Damage per level)

name: Mental Force
desc: +6 Ability Power at level 18 (+0.33 Ability Power per level)

name: Feast
desc: Killing a unit restores 3 Health and 1 Mana

name: Spell Weaving
desc: Damaging an enemy champion with a Basic Attack increases Spell Damage by 1%, stacking up to 3 times (max 3% damage increase)

name: Martial Mastery
desc: +4 Attack Damage

name: Arcane Mastery
desc: +6 Ability Power

name: Executioner
desc: Increases damage dealt to champions below 20% Health by 5%

name: Blade Weaving
desc: Damaging an enemy champion with a spell increases Basic Attack Damage by 1%, stacking up to 3 times (max 3% damage increase)

name: Warlord
desc: Increases bonus Attack Damage by 2%

name: Archmage
desc: Increases Ability Power by 2%

name: Dangerous Game
desc: Champion kills and assists restore 5% missing Health and Mana

name: Frenzy
desc: Critical hits grant +5% Attack Speed for 3 seconds (stacks up to 3 times)

name: Devastating Strikes
desc: +2% Armor and Magic Penetration

name: Arcane Blade
desc: Basic Attacks also deal bonus magic damage equal to 5% of Ability Power

name: Havoc
desc: +3% increased damage

name: Block
desc: Reduces incoming damage from champion basic attacks by 1

name: Recovery
desc: +1 Health per 5 seconds

name: Enchanted Armor
desc: Increases bonus Armor and Magic Resist by 2.5%

name: Tough Skin
desc: Reduces damage taken from neutral monsters by 1 This does not affect lane minions

name: Unyielding
desc: Melee - Reduces all incoming damage from champions by 2 Ranged - Reduces all incoming damage from champions by 1

name: Veteran's Scars
desc: +12 Health

name: Bladed Armor
desc: Taking Basic Attack Damage from neutral monsters cause them to bleed, dealing physical damage equal to 1% of their current Health each second This does not work against lane minions

name: Oppression
desc: Reduces damage taken by 3% from enemies that have impaired movement (slows, snares, taunts, stuns, etc.)

name: Juggernaut
desc: +3% Maximum Health

name: Hardiness
desc: +2 Armor

name: Resistance
desc: +2 Magic Resist

name: Perseverance
desc: Regenerates 0.35% of missing Health every 5 seconds

name: Swiftness
desc: Reduces the effectiveness of slows by 10%

name: Reinforced Armor
desc: Reduces the total damage taken from critical strikes by 10%

name: Evasive
desc: Reduces damage taken by 4% from Area of Effect magic damage

name: Second Wind
desc: Increases self-healing, Health Regen, Lifesteal, and Spellvamp by 10% when below 25% Health

name: Legendary Guardian
desc: +1 Armor and 0.5 Magic Resist for each nearby enemy champion

name: Runic Blessing
desc: Start the game with a 50 Health shield. This shield regenerates each time after respawning

name: Tenacious
desc: Reduces the duration of crowd control effects by 15%

name: Phasewalker
desc: Reduces the casting time of Recall by 1 second Dominion - Reduces the casting time of Enhanced Recall by 0.5 seconds

name: Fleet of Foot
desc: +0.5% Movement Speed

name: Meditation
desc: +1 Mana Regen per 5 seconds

name: Scout
desc: Increases the cast range of trinket items by 15%

name: Summoner's Insight
desc: Reduces the cooldown of Summoner Spells by 4%

name: Strength of Spirit
desc: +1 Health Regen per 5 seconds for every 300 maximum Mana

name: Alchemist
desc: Increases the duration of potions and elixirs by 10%

name: Greed
desc: +0.5 Gold every 10 seconds

name: Runic Affinity
desc: Increases the duration of shrine, relic, quest, and neutral monster buffs by 20%

name: Vampirism
desc: +1% Lifesteal and Spellvamp

name: Culinary Master
desc: Health potions are upgraded into Biscuits that restore an additional 20 Health and 10 Mana instantly upon consumption

name: Scavenger
desc: +1 Gold each time an ally kills a nearby lane minion

name: Wealth
desc: +40 Starting Gold

name: Expanded Mind
desc: +2% increased maximum Mana

name: Inspiration
desc: +5 Experience every 10 seconds while near a higher level allied champion

name: Bandit
desc: Melee - Grants +15 Gold on champion kill or assist Ranged - Grants +3 Gold each time an enemy champion is attacked. This cannot trigger on the same champion more than once every 5 seconds

name: Intelligence
desc: +2% Cooldown Reduction and reduces the cooldown of Activated Items by 4%

name: Wanderer
desc: +5% Movement Speed out of combat
